papers: 地下车站洪水脆弱性级联效应分析

entries.problem_focus: natural-language GIS interaction and spatial reasoning
entries.our_advantage: FusionAgent ends in executable fusion artifacts with audit evidence instead of only interactive GIS outputs
entries.our_gap: less emphasis on polished spatial interaction UX
entries.borrow_direction: spatial intent decomposition and graph-aware retrieval
entries.non_goal: do not turn FusionAgent into a general GIS copilot

entries.our_advantage: FusionAgent already carries bounded execution and artifact evidence beyond query verification
entries.our_gap: tool and failure contracts are not yet uniformly enforced
entries.borrow_direction: structured error metadata and deterministic verification loops
entries.non_goal: do not reduce the system story to text-to-query correctness alone

entries.our_advantage: FusionAgent already binds ontology-like KG structure to executable tasks and outputs
entries.our_gap: unsupported-intent guard and ontology-backed rejection can be stronger
entries.borrow_direction: ontology-grounded rejection and bounded reasoning discipline
entries.non_goal: do not expand into a large off-task ontology engineering program

entries.our_advantage: FusionAgent already has bounded runtime evidence and explicit execution stages
entries.our_gap: planner retrieval can still be lower-noise and more priority-aware
entries.non_goal: do not introduce costly multi-round self-dialogue just to resemble path-search papers

entries.our_advantage: FusionAgent is centered on executable geospatial fusion rather than QA or report generation
entries.our_gap: community-level reporting and retrieval explainability can be sharper
entries.borrow_direction: dual-channel retrieval summaries and structured extraction patterns
entries.non_goal: do not shift the runtime into a text QA system

entries.paper: 地下车站洪水脆弱性级联效应分析
entries.problem_focus: infrastructure dependency and flood cascade reasoning
entries.our_advantage: FusionAgent already has a bounded scenario runtime that can host dependency-aware evidence later
entries.our_gap: scenario dependency reasoning is still comparatively shallow
entries.borrow_direction: facility dependency modeling and bounded cascade reasoning
entries.non_goal: do not expand the scenario layer into a full digital twin simulation platform
